title: External Plugin Installed
objective: A user state with a local external plugin fixture installed, used to exercise non-bundled plugin lifecycle behavior.

setup.title: Write External Plugin Fixture
setup.intent: Create a minimal external plugin with manifest and package metadata.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; const root=path.join(home,"plugins","kova-external-plugin"); fs.mkdirSync(root,{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(root,"manifest.json"),JSON.stringify({id:"kova-external-plugin",name:"Kova External Plugin",version:"0.0.0",entry:"index.js"},null,2)); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(root,"package.json"),JSON.stringify({name:"kova-external-plugin",version:"0.0.0",main:"index.js"},null,2)); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(root,"index.js"),"export default {};\n");'

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes state fixture files
